findings.body: The contract_version validation error message implies a missing field even when the parsed value exists but is not 1.
readReviewGateFreshness and readLandingGateFreshness duplicate file reads and parsing already performed by readCockpitStatus/readStaleEvidence.
buildGateTrustSignal uses a nested ternary for freshness_state and can mislabel stale state with a missing-evidence default staleness reason.
The template fixture YAML nests derived_projection_rules and source_artifacts under artifact_types instead of aligning them as policy siblings of artifact_types.

attempts.summary: CodeRabbit completed the focused BANDIT-056 Stage 3 delta review and returned two trivial open findings against focused session-context pathExists sequencing and review_subject_hash source_identity metadata.
Codex PM locally repaired both prior CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence was intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the repaired source and returned five open findings: one major stale-freshness trust-signal issue, three minor validation/template normalization issues, and one trivial cockpit-status helper extraction issue.

Codex PM locally repaired all five focused CodeRabbit findings with regression coverage and adjacent projection verification. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned four open findings: two minor evidence-freshness/test normalization findings and two trivial readability/I/O hardening findings.

executableEvidence: coderabbit auth status --agent returned authenticated for GitHub user pyxe-developer.
coderabbit review --agent --base-commit c5eb2700502237e3269a82818edd994a4006d878 -c AGENTS.md --no-color completed with 4 findings.
